steps.title: Set the function value
steps.content:
The question asks for the input that makes $h(x)=630$. Since $h(x)=\frac{x}{2}$, set the expression equal to $630$.
$$\frac{x}{2}=630$$

steps.title: Solve for the input
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $2$ to undo the division by $2$.
$$x=630\cdot2=1{,}260$$
The answer is 1260.
